reviewed_hits.notes: Existing diagnostics export action is a support artifact surface, not diagnostics live history.
References appear inside forbidden_fields_excluded privacy metadata.
Export result reduces bundle_path to basename and replaces changed files with diagnostics_bundle markers; it does not parse bundle contents.

Used for preview navigation query params; not diagnostics history storage.

notes: Current surfaces expose diagnostics export metadata, sanitized artifact references, and an explicitly deferred diagnostics-history fixture surface only. No diagnostics live history implementation or UI-side raw log/state/bundle read was admitted by this contour.
